heading: Demonstration and support projects for legal assistance for older individuals
label: 3032i Demonstration and support projects for legal assistance for older individuals

children.label: C
children.text: provision of substantive legal advice and assistance; and

children.label: D
children.text: assistance in the design, implementation, and administration of legal assistance delivery systems to local providers of legal assistance for older individuals; and
support demonstration projects to expand or improve the delivery of legal assistance to older individuals with social or economic needs.

children.heading: Assurances
children.label: b Assurances
children.text: Any grants or contracts made under subsection (a)(2) shall contain assurances that the requirements of are met.section 3027(a)(11) of this title

children.heading: Assistance
children.label: c Assistance
children.text: To carry out subsection (a)(1), the Assistant Secretary shall make grants to or enter into contracts with nonprofit organizations experienced in providing support and technical assistance on a nationwide basis to States, area agencies on aging, legal assistance providers, ombudsmen, elder abuse prevention programs, and other organizations interested in the legal rights of older individuals.
